_description: Scoring configuration — shelf placement (ABC), location grades (ABC), product grades (ABCDE hidden)

shelf_multiplier._note: 3-tier shelf placement: A=premium eye-level, B=mid-level, C=bottom/back. Bots can see these values.

product_multiplier._note: 5-tier product grading (HIDDEN — bots cannot see this, must learn from sales data)

category_shelf_priority._note: Categories listed first get placed on A-shelves first. Initial merchandising only.
